artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his profile.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry names and his own sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry names. His production style is characterized by the fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, establishing a distinct sound within the electronic music landscape.

He has collaborated with several well-known artists, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer. These collaborations have helped shape his profile and contributed to his recognition in the music industry.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used in various productions, offering insight into his creative process.
His work is often associated with a network of similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, further situating him within a broader scene of electronic music production.
